people_highlights.name: Ethan Mollick
people_highlights.post: We really need a better word for the good kind of AI psychosis, the one where someone goes into a fugue state with the latest model and returns 40 days later from the mountaintop with something new.
people_highlights.why: Recent post from AI researcher at Wharton

people_highlights.name: Google DeepMind
people_highlights.post:
For @DemisHassabis, the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. 🕹️

His epiphany that software could act on our behalf remains at the heart of our work today as we apply the same logic to solving scientific grand challenges.

Read more on @FastCompany
people_highlights.why: Recent post from Official at Google

people_highlights.name: Simon Willison
people_highlights.post:
The conclusions here feel wrong to me. The two lessons I see are:

1. Don't run agents anywhere they might be able to access production environment credentials - it's on you to know which credentials those are

2. Keep tested backups that are independent from your production host

trending_posts.post:
It happened. Claude Code has been dethroned.

I've lived in Codex w/ ChatGPT 5.5 the last couple of days and it is the:

• Smartest model
• Best all around AI app
• Most powerful features (computer use and image gen)

Here's everything you need to know about this A+ release: http

🔸SHANTAE (7 Sirens) MODEL RELEASE  - UPDATE🔸

My Shantae model, released back in late 2021, has gotten a complete makeover: new textures, accessories and rig! 

Current owners can download the new files from their respective libaries.

👇 Link below👇

#b3d https://t.co/m6cM6iJdL8

Mark my words: OpenAI will release GPT-5.6 within 4 to 6 weeks.

Progress is compounding now.

Anyone using the current Codex can feel it. The jump from model to agent is happening in real time.

April '26 LLM Releases (definitive)

I've been gathering these all month 😵‍💫

- GPT-5.5 or (“Spud”) ✅
- Meta Muse Spark ✅
- Claude 5 or (“Mythos”) - Beta Release ✅
- Claude 4.7 ✅
- Deepseek V4 Preview Pro/Flash ✅
- Grok 4.3 (beta) ✅
- Gemini 3.1 Flash Live ✅
- Kimi K2.6 ✅
release an llm named GTA6 and watch global chaos unfold

Finally, the long project that I almost forgot got into beta release. You can try it by downloading the artifact from GitHub. https://t.co/w9IefZCXYe. Currently, it is only available with Gemini translation. The stable release will try to include the local LLM as a translator. ht

🚨 Major Open-Source Release! This Unified Multimodel Foundation Model Sees, Understands, Chats, and Generates Images 🔥

LLaDA2.0-Uni is a unified diffusion LLM that combines visual understanding + image generation in a single native model.

It is a single native architecture http

@johnennis Yes but timestamps on those fixes was before 4.7 release except for the one on April 20th. 

Either way. No shot at you at all. Simply something I’ve observed often on here. Certain things aren’t linear with LLM progress. Although that would be awesome :-)

Andrej Karpathy release 2 jam walkthrough cara dia pakai LLM di real life. Bukan teori atau benchmark, tapi workflow asli dari salah satu mind terbaik di AI. Worth ditonton buat yang mau lihat gimana proses berpikir dan prompting di level expert
@rasbt My brain is starting to file LLM architectures like retro console generations. Same core idea, but every release adds a clever new trick in the hardware.
